subtitle: Court news and troubling choices
noEvents: No events yet. Check the court again later.

unknown.title: Unknown event
unknown.body: The court has received troubling news, but the details are not yet recorded.
unknown.choiceDescription: The consequences of this choice are not recorded.
unknown.resultBody: The consequences have been entered into the court ledger.

found_old_idol.title: Old Idol in the Woods
found_old_idol.body: Woodcutters found a black idol tangled in the roots. People argue whether to sell it to merchants or give it to the volkhvs.

sell_to_merchants.label: Sell it to merchants
sell_to_merchants.description: Merchants ask few questions when the price is good.

result.title: The idol went with the merchants
result.body: The merchants took the find without many words. The treasury grew heavier, but the elders look toward the forest with more worry.

give_to_volkhvs.label: Give it to the volkhvs
give_to_volkhvs.description: The volkhvs will accept the sign and feed the people after the rite.

result.title: The volkhvs accepted the idol
result.body: The idol vanished in herbal smoke. People speak more quietly, but the court looks more devout.

ruler_bad_dream.title: The Ruler's Dream
ruler_bad_dream.body: The ruler woke before dawn. A headless wolf had stood in the dream by the town gates.

calm_the_court.label: Calm the court
calm_the_court.description: Say that dreams have no power over the living.

result.title: The court is calmed
result.body: The ruler met the people with a steady face. Fear retreated, and the court's word grew firmer.

use_the_omen.label: Use the omen
use_the_omen.description: Let enemies hear that even dreams serve your will.

result.title: The omen became a weapon
result.body: The dream was retold until neighbors remembered their gates and locks. The court grew quieter.

volunteers_at_gate.title: Volunteers at the Gate
volunteers_at_gate.body: Several young people came to the gate and ask to join the militia.

accept_volunteers.label: Accept the volunteers
accept_volunteers.description: Feed them and put them into the militia line.

result.title: New people in the ranks
result.body: The volunteers received stew and spears. The line stands thicker now.

send_home.label: Send them home
send_home.description: Let them serve the settlement through work instead.

result.title: The volunteers returned home
result.body: The youths left without resentment. By evening their families sent a little food to the stores.

patron_envoy.title: Patron Envoy
patron_envoy.body: An envoy has arrived at the gate. He speaks softly, but the seal on his letter feels heavy.

receive_politely.label: Receive him politely
receive_politely.description: Meet the envoy with bread, salt, and a heavy smile.

result.title: The envoy is pleased
result.body: The envoy left with gifts and the proper words. The seal on the letter seemed a little lighter.

keep_distance.label: Keep your distance
keep_distance.description: Hear the envoy out without too many bows.

result.title: The court kept its face
result.body: The envoy left coldly, but the people noticed that the court did not rush to bend its neck.

black_birds_over_walls.title: Black Birds over the Walls
black_birds_over_walls.body: Black birds sat on the walls all night. In the morning, people found claw marks on the granary doors.

burn_incense.label: Burn incense
burn_incense.description: Spend provisions on a cleansing rite.

result.title: Smoke rose above the walls
result.body: The birds vanished before noon. People still whisper, but they thank the court for the rite.

ignore_omen.label: Ignore the omen
ignore_omen.description: Let the birds sit until hunger moves them on.

result.title: The sign went unanswered
result.body: The birds flew off on their own. People decided the court does not fear even ill wings.

cracked_granary_roof.title: Cracked Granary Roof
cracked_granary_roof.body: After a night of rain, the granary roof began to leak. If you wait, the grain will start to spoil.

repair_now.label: Repair it now
repair_now.description: Spend wood and preserve the stores.

result.title: The granary is saved
result.body: The roof holds. People grumble about the work, but the grain stayed dry.

ignore_leak.label: Wait
ignore_leak.description: Save the wood, but risk the stores.

result.title: Damp stores
result.body: The boards stayed in storage, but some of the grain blackened from the damp.

lucky_market_day.title: Lucky Market Day
lucky_market_day.body: Foreign merchants have come to market. Their purses are heavy and their questions careful.

sell_surplus.label: Sell surplus
sell_surplus.description: Trade some food and wood for gold.

result.title: A ringing bargain
result.body: The merchants left satisfied. The treasury grew heavier, and the stores a little emptier.

refuse_trade.label: Guard the stores
refuse_trade.description: Refuse the deal and keep your provisions.

result.title: Closed gates
result.body: The merchants went on to the neighbors. In town, people look toward winter with calmer eyes.

stone_in_old_well.title: Stone in the Old Well
stone_in_old_well.body: Workers cleaning the old well found stonework below. It may hide an ancient passage, or only good stone.

result.title: Stone brought up
result.body: The masonry was taken apart without any discovery. Still, carts returned with solid stone.

seal_well.label: Seal the well
seal_well.description: Do not trouble an old place.

result.title: The well is closed
result.body: The elders approved. No one knows what lay beneath the stonework, and that suits them.

forest_tax_dispute.title: Forest Tax Dispute
forest_tax_dispute.body: Woodcutters are arguing with the treasurer. They say the new tax will leave their families without bread.

lower_tax.label: Lower the tax
lower_tax.description: Lose gold, but keep the peace.

result.title: Axes ring again
result.body: The woodcutters returned to work. The treasurer is displeased, but the people remember the court's softness.

enforce_tax.label: Take what is due
enforce_tax.description: Gain gold at the cost of resentment.

result.title: The tax is collected
result.body: The treasury filled. In the woods, people now work silently and look at the ground.

ruler_public_judgment.title: Judgment at the Gate
ruler_public_judgment.body: Two families dispute land by the stream. Both demand that the ruler decide the matter personally.

judge_by_oath.label: Judge by oath
judge_by_oath.description: Strengthen honor, but offend one side.

result.title: The oath decides
result.body: Not everyone accepted the ruling, but no one dared argue with a spoken oath.

judge_by_payment.label: Take compensation
judge_by_payment.description: Fill the treasury and close the dispute by authority.

result.title: The dispute is bought
result.body: The land was divided by charter, and the treasury grew heavier. People speak more softly by the stream now.

ruler_fever.title: The Ruler's Fever
ruler_fever.body: The ruler woke burning with fever. Healers argue: rest, or show the people that the court is not weak.

let_rest.label: Let the ruler rest
let_rest.description: Spend food and herbs while preserving the court's face.

result.title: A quiet chamber
result.body: The court fell quiet for a day. By evening the fever eased, though rumors had already crossed the market.

result.title: A pale appearance
result.body: The people saw the ruler at the gate. He stood straight, though his hands shook beneath the cloak.

court_whispers.title: Court Whispers
court_whispers.body: Advisers say someone has been meeting foreign merchants too often.

investigate_quietly.label: Investigate quietly
investigate_quietly.description: Spend gold on a secret check.

result.title: A quiet inquiry
result.body: The trail leads to a minor clerk. The court did not have to stage a public storm.

result.title: A loud punishment
result.body: People understood the hint. Now the court speaks less, but listens more carefully.

ruler_generous_feast.title: Feast for the Court
ruler_generous_feast.body: After good days, the warriors ask for a feast. The treasurer hisses that winter is near.

hold_feast.label: Hold the feast
hold_feast.description: Spend food and gold for loyalty.

result.title: A warm hall
result.body: That evening, songs in the hall rose louder than the wind. By morning the treasury was thinner, but faces had softened.

result.title: Empty tables
result.body: The warriors dispersed in silence. No one argued, but there was no singing that night.

rusty_spears_found.title: Rusty Spears
rusty_spears_found.body: A bundle of spears was found in an old shed. The iron is poor, but even poor iron serves in militia hands.

result.title: The spears are straightened
result.body: The smith cursed the rust, but by evening three new spears stood by the wall.

melt_parts.label: Sell them for scrap
melt_parts.description: Gain a little gold and stone through trade.

result.title: The old iron is sold
result.body: The spears went to merchants as scrap. The army did not grow, but the treasury rang.

young_hunters_offer.title: Young Hunters
young_hunters_offer.body: Several hunters offer to serve as scouts. They know the forest, but listen poorly to orders.

result.title: Tracks accepted
result.body: The hunters swore service. Their eyes still turn more often to the forest than to the gate.

result.title: The forest took its own
result.body: The hunters left without a bow. By morning there were more unfamiliar tracks in the woods.

militia_drill.title: Militia Drill
militia_drill.body: The voivode asks for a day of drill. Work will stop, but people will learn to hold formation.

hold_drill.label: Hold the drill
hold_drill.description: Spend food, gain militia and honor.

result.title: Formation at the gate
result.body: By evening arms were tired, but the spears no longer pointed every which way.

result.title: Work comes first
result.body: The voivode is displeased. The fields and lumberyards, at least, did not stand empty.

deserter_at_night.title: Deserter in the Night
deserter_at_night.body: At night, the guard caught a militiaman. He meant to leave for kin beyond the river.

forgive_deserter.label: Forgive him
forgive_deserter.description: Keep the man, but weaken fear.

result.title: Fear forgiven
result.body: He was returned to the ranks. Some call it mercy, others weakness.

punish_deserter.label: Punish him
punish_deserter.description: Strengthen fear, but lose a fighter.

result.title: Night punishment
result.body: After the punishment, no one spoke by the fires. In the morning, the line stood straighter than usual.

imperial_tax_scribe.title: Imperial Scribe
imperial_tax_scribe.body: A scribe of the Empire of Dusk asks to compare household lists. He smiles as if he already knows the answer.

cooperate.label: Hand over the lists
cooperate.description: Improve relations with the Empire at the cost of local trust.

result.title: The lists are accepted
result.body: The scribe left satisfied. People noticed how long his quill scratched over the paper.

delay_scribe.label: Delay him
delay_scribe.description: Keep face before the people, but chill relations with the Empire.

result.title: The ink did not dry
result.body: The scribe rode away with an empty folder. He made no threats, but his silence was worse than one.

imperial_road_offer.title: Road Plan
imperial_road_offer.body: An Imperial master offers to improve the road to market. For the work, he asks stone and obedience to deadlines.

accept_road_plan.label: Accept the plan
accept_road_plan.description: Spend stone, gain gold and favor.

result.title: A straight road
result.body: The road is better now. Carts roll more easily, and so do foreign boots.

refuse_road_plan.label: Refuse
refuse_road_plan.description: Keep the stone, but cool the Empire.

result.title: A crooked track
result.body: The master rolled up his plan. The old roads remain old, but they remain yours.

old_pact_oath_stone.title: Oath Stone
old_pact_oath_stone.body: The volkhvs of the Old Pact ask to renew the oath at the old stone. The people wait for a sign.

result.title: The oath speaks
result.body: The words settled on the stone heavy and even. Even the wind paused for a moment.

avoid_rite.label: Avoid the rite
avoid_rite.description: Save provisions, but weaken the Pact's trust.

result.title: The stone is silent
result.body: The rite was postponed. The volkhvs said nothing, and everyone noticed their silence.

old_pact_refugees.title: People from the Border
old_pact_refugees.body: Refugees have come from the Border. The Old Pact asks you to take in at least some families.

accept_families.label: Accept the families
accept_families.description: Spend food, gain population and favor.

result.title: New hearths
result.body: Smoke rises again from empty huts. The children fear loud sounds, but already help carry water.

result.title: The gates are closed
result.body: The people went farther down the road. Their tracks stayed visible in the mud for a long time.

black_milk_morning.title: Black Milk
black_milk_morning.body: In the morning, one family brought a bucket of milk the color of soot. The cow is healthy, but no one wants to drink it.

burn_the_milk.label: Burn the milk
burn_the_milk.description: Spend food and calm the people.

result.title: Black smoke
result.body: The milk was burned beyond the wall. The smell was strange, but people dispersed more calmly.

result.title: A strange bargain
result.body: The stranger paid without haggling. After he left, there were no tracks in the snow.

whispering_grain.title: Whispers in the Grain
whispering_grain.body: People hear whispering in the storehouse when grain is poured. No one can repeat the words.

bless_granary.label: Cleanse the granary
bless_granary.description: Spend food and gold to quiet fear.

result.title: Quiet grain
result.body: After the rite, the granary fell silent. The rats vanished too, which troubles the keeper.

ignore_whispers.label: Do not listen
ignore_whispers.description: Save resources and accept the unease.

result.title: The whisper remains
result.body: The grain still rustles too much like speech. But the bread made from it is filling.

red_moon_over_walls.title: Red Moon
red_moon_over_walls.body: The moon rose red, like coal under ash. The watch asks for a double guard.

double_watch.label: Double the watch
double_watch.description: Spend food, gain militia and peace of mind.

result.title: Night under guard
result.body: The night passed without attack. At dawn, everyone pretended they had not expected worse.

let_them_sleep.label: Let them sleep
let_them_sleep.description: Save food, but deepen your dark reputation.

result.title: A quiet night
result.body: No one died. But in the morning, red dust was found on the gates.

child_names_shadow.title: The Shadow Calls a Name
child_names_shadow.body: A child by the well said a shadow called their name. Adults argue whether it was only the wind.

close_well_day.label: Close the well
close_well_day.description: Lose a little food and calm the people.

result.title: Water under lock
result.body: The well was closed until morning. In the night, the chain on the lid rang by itself.

result.title: Laughter at the well
result.body: People laughed too loudly. The child no longer goes to the water alone.
